title: Epoxy Floors for Salons and Parlors - Elite South Texas
content:
Salons and Parlors
Salons & parlors require durable flooring that not only withstand heavy traffic but are also aesthetically pleasing while being easy to maintain. Our customizable self-leveling seamless flooring solutions are made for new or existing construction and offer chemical, stain and abrasion resistance. The surfaces are antimicrobial and a variable coefficient of friction to meet ADA Flat Surfaces, ADA Inclined Surfaces, OSHA and NFPA requirements.
Advantages
Custom logos and floor markings
Easy to clean and maintain
Ultra durable, high abrasion resistance withstands heavy traffic
Fluid applied systems for new construction or existing floor remodels
Finish options include high gloss or satin
Variable coefficient of friction (COF) levels to meet ADA Flat Surfaces, ADA Inclined Surfaces, OSHA and NFPA requirements
Flexible options for impact absorption
Antimicrobial and stain resistant
Resistant to hair, nail and other chemical products
Seamless, impermeable and non-porous flooring
Hair salons & barbershops
Tattoo & piercing shops
Spas
Lobbies & waiting areas
Primary workstations
Restrooms
Employee break rooms
